Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France |height = {{convert|1.92|m|ftin|0|order=flip|abbr=on}} |weight = {{convert|91|kg|stlb|abbr=on|order=flip}} | position = {{rlp|CE|WG}} | club1 = {{nowrap|[[Catalans Dragons]]}} | year1start = 2021 | year1end = present | appearances1 = 66 | tries1 = 24 | goals1 = 0 | fieldgoals1 = 0 | points1 = 96 |club2 = {{nowrap|→ [[Toulouse Olympique]]}} |year2start = 2023{{small|[[Rugby league dual registration|(DR)]]}} |year2end = |appearances2 = 8 |tries2 = 0 |goals2 = 0 |fieldgoals2 = 0 |points2 = 0 | teamA = [[France national rugby league team|France]] | yearAstart = 2021 | yearAend = present | appearancesA = 7 | triesA = 2 | goalsA = 0 | fieldgoalsA = 0 | pointsA = 8 | new = yes | source = [https://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/matthieu-laguerre/summary.html Rugby League Project][http://www.itsrugby.co.uk/joueurs/mathieu-laguerre-38251.html Itsrugby]{{Rugby league records|title=Mathieu Laguerre|id=7405}} | updated = 5 September 2024 }} '''Matthieu Laguerre''' (born 3 February 1999) is a French professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|ce}} for the [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level. He has previously played for [[Saint-Esteve XIII Catalan|Saint-Esteve]] in the [[Elite One Championship]]. ==Background== Laguerre was born in Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur in [[France]]. ==Career== In 2021 he made his [[Catalans Dragons|Catalans]] debut in the [[Super League]] against [[Hull Kingston Rovers]].{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/match/EVP3532949|title=Super League: Catalans Dragons v Hull Kingston Rovers|publisher=BBC|date=27 March 2021|accessdate=27 March 2021}} ==References== {{reflist|30em}} ==External links== *[http://www.catalansdragons.com/fiche-587-laguerre-matthieu/ Catalans Dragons profile] *[https://www.ffr13.fr/joueur/laguerre-mathieu/ France profile] *[https://www.nrl.com/players/rugby-league-world-cup/france/matthieu-laguerre/ French profile] {{Catalans Dragons squad}} {{France 2021 Rugby League World Cup squad}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Laguerre, Matthieu}} [[Category:1999 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:AS Saint Estève players]] [[Category:Catalans Dragons players]] [[Category:France national rugby league team players]] [[Category:French rugby league players]] [[Category:Rugby league centres]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Marseille]] [[Category:Toulouse Olympique players]] [[Category:21st-century French sportsmen]] {{France-rugbyleague-bio-stub}}
